PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\mifma\\Documents\\CodeSandbox\\BlazePoint\\src\\BlazePoint\\Components\\Pages\\Workflows.razor"; $c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f\); $c = $c.Replace\('await Workflows.GetDefinitionsAsync\(\)', 'await WorkflowsSvc.GetDefinitionsAsync\(\)'\).Replace\('await Workflows.GetInstancesAsync\(\)', 'await WorkflowsSvc.GetInstancesAsync\(\)'\).Replace\('await Workflows.StartAsync\(', 'await WorkflowsSvc.StartAsync\('\).Replace\('await Workflows.DeleteDefinitionAsync\(', 'await WorkflowsSvc.DeleteDefinitionAsync\('\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($f, $c, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false\)\))
